title: SEOshaf Project Config
description: Per-project parameters for the SEOshaf managed-agent system. One file per project under ~/Documents/SEOshaf/projects/. Validated by every cadence skill before any work runs. Adding a new project means writing one of these files and calling lib/schedule-routines.sh.

project_id.description: Kebab-case identifier. Used as scheduled-task-id prefix and dashboard key. Stable forever — renaming breaks history.

domain.description: Bare domain or subdomain, no scheme. e.g. www.keelway.com

repo_path.description: Absolute path to the project's local repo. Artifacts are written under this path's outputs.research_dir. Spaces are allowed and must be preserved literally.

active.description: When false, the dashboard hides the project and all scheduled cadences exit early.

persona_filter.description: Free-text prompt fragment injected into every skill. Describes who the BUYER is and what audiences to exclude. This is the single most important field — bad persona_filter produces patient-facing keywords on a B2B site.

buyer_exclude.description: Explicit terms or audience labels to exclude (e.g. 'driver-facing', 'consumer trucking'). Used as a hard filter on top of persona_filter.

priority_pages.description: URL paths (leading slash, no host) for the indexation watch. Max ~10 — agent samples the top entries each day.

serp.description: Google SERP queries for weekly rank tracking.

ai.description: Natural-language prompts to ask ChatGPT / Perplexity / Gemini / AI Overviews for citation tracking.

competitors.description: Competitor domains (bare, no scheme). Used by seo-keyword-competitor-refresh for Semrush competitor mining.

seed_keywords.description: Seed phrases for keyword expansion. The skill broadens these via Semrush.

semrush_db.description: Semrush database code, e.g. 'us'. Default 'us' when absent.

gsc_property.description: GSC property string. When absent, indexation skill skips GSC-specific checks.

bing_site.description: Bing Webmaster site URL. When absent, indexation skill skips Bing-specific checks.
